'''soshataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eosinophil|eosinophil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eosinophil|eosinophil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| soshataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:soshatithi|soshatithi]] || [[word:soshatiji|soshatiji]] || [[word:soshatishi|soshatishi]] || [[word:soshatiki|soshatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:soshatuthuthu|soshatuthuthu]] || [[word:soshatujuju|soshatujuju]] || [[word:soshatushushu|soshatushushu]] || [[word:soshatukuku|soshatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:soshatuthu|soshatuthu]] || [[word:soshatuju|soshatuju]] || [[word:soshatushu|soshatushu]] || [[word:soshatuku|soshatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:soshatufthuf|soshatufthuf]] || [[word:soshatufjuf|soshatufjuf]] || [[word:soshatufshuf|soshatufshuf]] || [[word:soshatufkuf|soshatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:soshatethe|soshatethe]] || [[word:soshateje|soshateje]] || [[word:soshateshe|soshateshe]] || [[word:soshateke|soshateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:soshatothotho|soshatothotho]] || [[word:soshatojojo|soshatojojo]] || [[word:soshatoshosho|soshatoshosho]] || [[word:soshatokoko|soshatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:soshatotho|soshatotho]] || [[word:soshatojo|soshatojo]] || [[word:soshatosho|soshatosho]] || [[word:soshatoko|soshatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:soshatofthof|soshatofthof]] || [[word:soshatofjof|soshatofjof]] || [[word:soshatofshof|soshatofshof]] || [[word:soshatofkof|soshatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:soshatïfthïf|soshatïfthïf]] || [[word:soshatïfjïf|soshatïfjïf]] || [[word:soshatïfshïf|soshatïfshïf]] || [[word:soshatïfkïf|soshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:soshatïfthïfthïf|soshatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:soshatïfjïfjïf|soshatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:soshatïfshïfshïf|soshatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:soshatïfkïfkïf|soshatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:soshatïfthïf|soshatïfthïf]] || [[word:soshatïfjïf|soshatïfjïf]] || [[word:soshatïfshïf|soshatïfshïf]] || [[word:soshatïfkïf|soshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:soshatïfthïf|soshatïfthïf]] || [[word:soshatïfjïf|soshatïfjïf]] || [[word:soshatïfshïf|soshatïfshïf]] || [[word:soshatïfkïf|soshatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:soshatæthæ|soshatæthæ]] || [[word:soshatæjæ|soshatæjæ]] || [[word:soshatæshæ|soshatæshæ]] || [[word:soshatækæ|soshatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:soshatathatha|soshatathatha]] || [[word:soshatajaja|soshatajaja]] || [[word:soshatashasha|soshatashasha]] || [[word:soshatakaka|soshatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:soshatatha|soshatatha]] || [[word:soshataja|soshataja]] || [[word:soshatasha|soshatasha]] || [[word:soshataka|soshataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:soshatafthaf|soshatafthaf]] || [[word:soshatafjaf|soshatafjaf]] || [[word:soshatafshaf|soshatafshaf]] || [[word:soshatafkaf|soshatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:soshatasha|soshatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:soshatshësha|soshatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soshatrosha|soshatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soshatmusha|soshatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:soshatyasha|soshatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososhatnkshësha|gososhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososhatnkrosha|gososhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososhatnkmusha|gososhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososhatnkyasha|gososhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:soshashatasha|soshashatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soshashatshësha|soshashatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soshashatrosha|soshashatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soshashatmusha|soshashatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soshashatyasha|soshashatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososhashatnkshësha|gososhashatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososhashatnkrosha|gososhashatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososhashatnkmusha|gososhashatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososhashatnkyasha|gososhashatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:seshætasha|seshætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:seshætshësha|seshætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:seshætrosha|seshætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:seshætmusha|seshætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:seshætyasha|seshætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goseshætnkshësha|goseshætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goseshætnkrosha|goseshætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goseshætnkmusha|goseshætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goseshætnkyasha|goseshætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:soshfatasha|soshfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:soshfatshësha|soshfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:soshfatrosha|soshfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:soshfatmusha|soshfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:soshfatyasha|soshfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gososhfatnkshësha|gososhfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gososhfatnkrosha|gososhfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gososhfatnkmusha|gososhfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gososhfatnkyasha|gososhfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
